fa-circle-notch.appearanceId: thin arc forming most of a circle with a small open gap, like a loading spinner; incomplete ring with a notch break at one end
fa-circle-notch.functionalityId: indicates a loading or processing state in progress; spins to show that an operation is running
fa-circle-notch.intentId: wait for a background task to complete; see that the system is actively working on a request

fa-circle-o.appearanceId: circle containing an uppercase letter O centered inside; round border enclosing the fifteenth letter of the alphabet
fa-circle-o.functionalityId: inserts or labels content with the letter O; selects or navigates to an O-indexed item
fa-circle-o.intentId: represent the letter O in a circular badge; identify something categorized or labeled with O

fa-circle-p.appearanceId: circle containing an uppercase letter P centered inside; round border enclosing the sixteenth letter of the alphabet
fa-circle-p.functionalityId: inserts or labels content with the letter P; selects or navigates to a P-indexed item
fa-circle-p.intentId: represent the letter P in a circular badge; identify something categorized or labeled with P

fa-circle-parking.appearanceId: circle containing an uppercase letter P centered inside, styled as a parking domain symbol; round badge with a bold P used in parking contexts
fa-circle-parking.functionalityId: navigates to a parking area, lot, or garage; marks a location as a designated parking zone
fa-circle-parking.intentId: find or navigate to available parking; indicate that a location offers vehicle parking

fa-circle-pause.appearanceId: two vertical parallel bars centered inside a filled circle; round shape enclosing a pause symbol
fa-circle-pause.functionalityId: pauses currently playing media or audio; suspends an active process or animation
fa-circle-pause.intentId: temporarily stop media playback; hold an ongoing action to resume later

fa-circle-phone.appearanceId: handset receiver shape centered inside a filled circle; round badge enclosing a telephone receiver silhouette
fa-circle-phone.functionalityId: initiates a phone call or opens the dialer; navigates to calling or contact features
fa-circle-phone.intentId: start a voice call to a contact; access phone or calling functionality

fa-circle-play.appearanceId: rightward-pointing solid triangle centered inside a filled circle; round shape enclosing a play arrow
fa-circle-play.functionalityId: starts or resumes media playback; launches a video or audio stream
fa-circle-play.intentId: play a media file or stream; begin watching or listening to content

fa-circle-plus.appearanceId: plus sign centered inside a filled circle; round badge enclosing a symmetric add symbol
fa-circle-plus.functionalityId: creates a new item or adds an element to a list; opens an add or create action within a circular control
fa-circle-plus.intentId: add something new to the current context; expand a collection or list with an additional entry

fa-circle-q.appearanceId: circle containing an uppercase letter Q centered inside; round border enclosing the seventeenth letter of the alphabet
fa-circle-q.functionalityId: inserts or labels content with the letter Q; selects or navigates to a Q-indexed item
fa-circle-q.intentId: represent the letter Q in a circular badge; identify something categorized or labeled with Q

fa-circle-quarter.appearanceId: circle with one quarter wedge segment filled and three quarters transparent; pie shape with a single ninety-degree filled slice
fa-circle-quarter.functionalityId: indicates a twenty-five percent progress or fill level; represents a one-quarter fraction of a total
fa-circle-quarter.intentId: show that a task or value is at twenty-five percent completion; represent a quarter portion of a whole

fa-circle-quarter-stroke.appearanceId: circle outline with a one-quarter arc segment drawn in a heavier stroke; ring with a ninety-degree arc portion emphasized
fa-circle-quarter-stroke.functionalityId: indicates a twenty-five percent progress along the circle's stroke; represents a partial ring at quarter completion
fa-circle-quarter-stroke.intentId: visualize a quarter-stage progress on a circular track; show a twenty-five percent status on a ring indicator

fa-circle-quarters.appearanceId: circle divided into four equal quadrant sections by two perpendicular lines; round shape segmented into four quarter wedges
fa-circle-quarters.functionalityId: indicates a four-part division or segmentation; represents categories or sections split into four equal parts
fa-circle-quarters.intentId: divide content into four equal sections; represent a four-way split or categorical breakdown

fa-circle-question.appearanceId: question mark centered inside a filled circle; round badge enclosing a bold query symbol
fa-circle-question.functionalityId: opens a help dialog or FAQ section; provides contextual assistance or tooltip information
fa-circle-question.intentId: get help or clarification about a feature; access support documentation or guidance

fa-circle-r.appearanceId: circle containing an uppercase letter R centered inside; round border enclosing the eighteenth letter of the alphabet
fa-circle-r.functionalityId: inserts or labels content with the letter R; selects or navigates to an R-indexed item
fa-circle-r.intentId: represent the letter R in a circular badge; identify something categorized or labeled with R

fa-circle-right.appearanceId: rightward-pointing chevron or arrow centered inside a filled circle; round badge enclosing a right-pointing directional symbol
fa-circle-right.functionalityId: navigates to the next item, page, or step; moves focus or selection to the right
fa-circle-right.intentId: advance forward to the next item or view; proceed to the next step in a sequence

fa-circle-s.appearanceId: circle containing an uppercase letter S centered inside; round border enclosing the nineteenth letter of the alphabet
fa-circle-s.functionalityId: inserts or labels content with the letter S; selects or navigates to an S-indexed item
fa-circle-s.intentId: represent the letter S in a circular badge; identify something categorized or labeled with S

fa-circle-small.appearanceId: small solid filled dot or compact circle shape; diminutive round filled disc
fa-circle-small.functionalityId: marks a point, status indicator, or bullet position; acts as a small visual dot in a list or diagram
fa-circle-small.intentId: indicate a status point or bullet position; mark a location or list item with a minimal dot

fa-circle-sort.appearanceId: circle containing two opposing vertical arrows, one pointing up and one pointing down; round badge enclosing an up-down sort arrow pair
fa-circle-sort.functionalityId: sorts a list or data set in either ascending or descending order; toggles sort direction on a column or dataset
fa-circle-sort.intentId: organize a list by reordering its items; change the sort order of displayed data

fa-circle-sort-down.appearanceId: circle containing a downward arrow paired with a smaller upward arrow, with the down arrow emphasized; round badge enclosing a sort pair weighted toward descending
fa-circle-sort-down.functionalityId: sorts a list or data set in descending order; applies a descending sort to the current column
fa-circle-sort-down.intentId: reorder a list from highest to lowest; apply a descending sort to view the largest values first

fa-circle-sort-up.appearanceId: circle containing an upward arrow paired with a smaller downward arrow, with the up arrow emphasized; round badge enclosing a sort pair weighted toward ascending
fa-circle-sort-up.functionalityId: sorts a list or data set in ascending order; applies an ascending sort to the current column
fa-circle-sort-up.intentId: reorder a list from lowest to highest; apply an ascending sort to view the smallest values first

fa-circle-star.appearanceId: five-pointed star shape centered inside a filled circle; round badge enclosing a star symbol
fa-circle-star.functionalityId: marks an item as a favorite or top-rated; adds a star rating within a circular badge control
fa-circle-star.intentId: save an item as a favorite; indicate that something is highly rated or preferred

fa-circle-sterling.appearanceId: circle containing a pound sterling currency symbol centered inside; round badge enclosing a stylized capital L with a crossbar
fa-circle-sterling.functionalityId: indicates a British pound currency value or payment option; opens a GBP pricing or billing section
fa-circle-sterling.intentId: represent a price or transaction in British pounds; access sterling currency payment details

fa-circle-stop.appearanceId: solid square centered inside a filled circle; round badge enclosing a stop square symbol
fa-circle-stop.functionalityId: stops currently playing media or an active process; halts a running task or stream
fa-circle-stop.intentId: end media playback or terminate an active operation; fully stop something that is running

fa-circle-t.appearanceId: circle containing an uppercase letter T centered inside; round border enclosing the twentieth letter of the alphabet
fa-circle-t.functionalityId: inserts or labels content with the letter T; selects or navigates to a T-indexed item
fa-circle-t.intentId: represent the letter T in a circular badge; identify something categorized or labeled with T

fa-circle-three-quarters.appearanceId: circle with three quarter wedge segments filled and one quarter transparent; pie shape with a two-hundred-seventy-degree filled arc
fa-circle-three-quarters.functionalityId: indicates a seventy-five percent progress or fill level; represents a three-quarter fraction of a total
fa-circle-three-quarters.intentId: show that a task or value is at seventy-five percent completion; represent a three-quarter portion of a whole

fa-circle-three-quarters-stroke.appearanceId: circle outline with a three-quarter arc segment drawn in a heavier stroke; ring with a two-hundred-seventy-degree arc portion emphasized
fa-circle-three-quarters-stroke.functionalityId: indicates a seventy-five percent progress along the circle's stroke; represents a partial ring at three-quarter completion
fa-circle-three-quarters-stroke.intentId: visualize a three-quarter-stage progress on a circular track; show a seventy-five percent status on a ring indicator

fa-circle-trash.appearanceId: trash can silhouette centered inside a filled circle; round badge enclosing a waste bin with a lid
fa-circle-trash.functionalityId: deletes or removes the selected item; opens a delete confirmation within a circular action button
fa-circle-trash.intentId: permanently remove or discard an item; clean up unwanted content from the current collection

fa-circle-u.appearanceId: circle containing an uppercase letter U centered inside; round border enclosing the twenty-first letter of the alphabet
fa-circle-u.functionalityId: inserts or labels content with the letter U; selects or navigates to a U-indexed item
fa-circle-u.intentId: represent the letter U in a circular badge; identify something categorized or labeled with U

fa-circle-up.appearanceId: upward-pointing chevron or arrow centered inside a filled circle; round badge enclosing an upward directional symbol
fa-circle-up.functionalityId: scrolls or moves content upward; navigates to a previous item or collapses a section
fa-circle-up.intentId: return to a higher position or previous item; scroll back up within a list or page

fa-circle-up-left.appearanceId: diagonal arrow pointing toward the upper-left centered inside a filled circle; round badge enclosing an upper-left directional symbol
fa-circle-up-left.functionalityId: navigates or moves content diagonally toward the upper-left; shifts focus or position to the upper-left corner
fa-circle-up-left.intentId: move or return to the upper-left area of a layout; navigate diagonally back toward a starting corner

fa-circle-up-right.appearanceId: diagonal arrow pointing toward the upper-right centered inside a filled circle; round badge enclosing an upper-right directional symbol
fa-circle-up-right.functionalityId: navigates or moves content diagonally toward the upper-right; shifts focus or position to the upper-right corner
fa-circle-up-right.intentId: move or expand toward the upper-right area of a layout; navigate diagonally forward to a top corner

fa-circle-user.appearanceId: person silhouette with a round head and shoulders centered inside a filled circle; round badge enclosing a generic user avatar
fa-circle-user.functionalityId: opens a user profile or account page; accesses identity or personal settings for the current user
fa-circle-user.intentId: view or edit a personal account profile; identify the currently logged-in user

fa-circle-v.appearanceId: circle containing an uppercase letter V centered inside; round border enclosing the twenty-second letter of the alphabet
fa-circle-v.functionalityId: inserts or labels content with the letter V; selects or navigates to a V-indexed item
fa-circle-v.intentId: represent the letter V in a circular badge; identify something categorized or labeled with V

fa-circle-video.appearanceId: video camera or film shape centered inside a filled circle; round badge enclosing a camera or video symbol
fa-circle-video.functionalityId: starts or opens a video recording or playback session; navigates to a video feature within a circular button
fa-circle-video.intentId: record or watch a video; access video capture or streaming functionality

fa-circle-w.appearanceId: circle containing an uppercase letter W centered inside; round border enclosing the twenty-third letter of the alphabet
fa-circle-w.functionalityId: inserts or labels content with the letter W; selects or navigates to a W-indexed item
fa-circle-w.intentId: represent the letter W in a circular badge; identify something categorized or labeled with W

fa-circle-wifi.appearanceId: stacked arc waves of a wifi signal centered inside a filled circle; round badge enclosing a wireless signal symbol
fa-circle-wifi.functionalityId: opens wifi settings or a wireless network connection panel; indicates wireless network status within a circle button
fa-circle-wifi.intentId: connect to or manage a wireless network; check or configure wifi settings

fa-circle-wifi-group.appearanceId: multiple circles each containing a wifi arc symbol, grouped or stacked together; cluster of round wifi-signal badges
fa-circle-wifi-group.functionalityId: manages or displays multiple wireless networks or access points; groups wifi connections into a single view
fa-circle-wifi-group.intentId: oversee multiple wifi networks or hotspots; select from a group of available wireless connections

fa-circle-x.appearanceId: circle containing an uppercase letter X centered inside; round border enclosing the twenty-fourth letter of the alphabet
fa-circle-x.functionalityId: inserts or labels content with the letter X; selects or navigates to an X-indexed item
fa-circle-x.intentId: represent the letter X in a circular badge; identify something categorized or labeled with X

fa-circle-xmark.appearanceId: diagonal cross or X mark centered inside a filled circle; round badge enclosing a close or cancel symbol
fa-circle-xmark.functionalityId: closes, dismisses, or cancels the current item or dialog; removes a selected entry or clears a field
fa-circle-xmark.intentId: dismiss or discard the current element; cancel an action or close an open panel

fa-circle-y.appearanceId: circle containing an uppercase letter Y centered inside; round border enclosing the twenty-fifth letter of the alphabet
fa-circle-y.functionalityId: inserts or labels content with the letter Y; selects or navigates to a Y-indexed item
fa-circle-y.intentId: represent the letter Y in a circular badge; identify something categorized or labeled with Y

fa-circle-yen.appearanceId: circle containing a yen currency symbol centered inside; round badge enclosing a capital Y with two horizontal crossbars
fa-circle-yen.functionalityId: indicates a Japanese yen currency value or payment option; opens a JPY pricing or billing section
fa-circle-yen.intentId: represent a price or transaction in Japanese yen; access yen currency payment details

fa-circle-z.appearanceId: circle containing an uppercase letter Z centered inside; round border enclosing the twenty-sixth letter of the alphabet
fa-circle-z.functionalityId: inserts or labels content with the letter Z; selects or navigates to a Z-indexed item
fa-circle-z.intentId: represent the letter Z in a circular badge; identify something categorized or labeled with Z

fa-circles-overlap.appearanceId: two circles partially overlapping each other, creating a shared intersection area in the center; Venn diagram with two intersecting round shapes
fa-circles-overlap.functionalityId: highlights shared or intersecting data between two sets; opens a comparison or overlap view between two groups
fa-circles-overlap.intentId: identify what two groups have in common; compare two datasets or categories to find shared elements

fa-citrus.appearanceId: whole round citrus fruit with a small stem and leaf on top; smooth spherical fruit outline resembling an orange or lemon
fa-citrus.functionalityId: tags content as citrus fruit or related produce; labels a recipe or grocery item as a citrus fruit
fa-citrus.intentId: find or categorize citrus-based recipes or food products; represent fresh fruit or healthy eating content

fa-citrus-slice.appearanceId: circular cross-section of a citrus fruit showing segmented wedge divisions radiating from the center; halved fruit with visible juice segments
fa-citrus-slice.functionalityId: tags content as a sliced citrus ingredient; labels a recipe step or food item featuring a citrus slice
fa-citrus-slice.intentId: indicate a citrus ingredient in a recipe; represent fresh-squeezed or sliced fruit in a food context

fa-city.appearanceId: cluster of rectangular buildings of varying heights forming a skyline silhouette; urban high-rise block arrangement viewed from the front
fa-city.functionalityId: navigates to a city or urban location category; selects a metropolitan area or city-level filter
fa-city.intentId: browse or filter content by city or urban area; represent an urban environment or metropolitan setting

fa-clapperboard.appearanceId: hinged slate board with diagonal striped top bar and a clapstick arm; film production clapper with bold stripes
fa-clapperboard.functionalityId: opens a video or film project; marks the beginning of a scene or take in production
fa-clapperboard.intentId: start or organize a video production scene; access film or video editing features

fa-clapperboard-play.appearanceId: hinged film clapperboard with diagonal striped top bar combined with a rightward-pointing play triangle on the board face; clapper slate overlaid with a play arrow
fa-clapperboard-play.functionalityId: plays a video clip or film scene directly; launches playback of a recorded take or production segment
fa-clapperboard-play.intentId: preview or watch a recorded scene or video clip; play back a specific take in a film or video project
